ribbon_development_rule: five or more houses on one side of any given 250 m of road frontage
sightline_x_m: 3.0 m (1-6 houses) / 4.5 m (7+/non-domestic); 2.4 m allowed in certain circumstances
sightline_y: National & Protected Routes 215 m; Regional Routes 125 m (75 m variants); 3.0 m setback allowed in certain circumstances (Table 13.13)
wastewater_standard: EPA Code of Practice: Domestic Waste Water Treatment Systems (p.e. 10)
residential_density_dph: Regional Growth Centres (Dundalk, Drogheda) 50/ha centre, 35 edge; Self-Sustaining Growth Towns (Ardee, Dunleer) 35 centre, 25 edge (Table 13.3)
plot_ratio: Regional Growth Centres 2 (centre)/1 (edge); Self-Sustaining Growth Towns 1/0.5 (Table 13.3); employment buildings 2:1 offices, 1.5:1 manufacturing/warehousing
separation_distance_m: 22 m between directly opposing first-floor habitable room windows
private_open_space: 1-2 bed: 50 m² (town centre/infill) / 60 m² (greenfield); 3+ bed: 60 m² / 80 m² (Table 13.4)
public_open_space_pct: normally 15% of total site area; up to 5 units with high-quality private open space: none required
car_parking_dwelling: Residential dwelling 1/1/2 per unit by Area (1=centre, 2=high transit, 3=other)
building_height: case-by-case; design statement required; per Urban Development and Building Height Guidelines (2018)
trigger_AA: Birds and Habitats Directives referenced; Appropriate Assessment screening under plan's environmental framework (partial)
trigger_AHIA: AHIA/ACA/protected structure procedures distributed across plan (Chapters 3, 9) (partial)
trigger_TTA: Workplace Travel Plan / Mobility Management Plan for new schools or developments >100 employees; Transport Mobility Management Plan to support parking reduction (13.16.13)
notes: Rural one-off qualifying criteria by Rural Policy Zone (Chapter 3 §3.17.4); no single fixed minimum site area. Backland only in Zones 1 & 2 (family-owned >=15 yrs, landholding >=1.5 ha, one dwelling per landowner). Parking dims: perpendicular 5.0x2.5 m. EV charging min 20% of spaces. School Demand Report >200 units. Design Statement >10 units. Tree replacement 5:1 Drogheda/Dundalk, 10:1 county. Road gradient max 1:50 first 5 m.
